artefacts.name: Risk Register – Q1 2026
artefacts.content_summary: Organisation-wide risk register containing 18 identified cybersecurity risks, each rated by likelihood and impact, with assigned owners and treatment plans.

artefacts.name: DPIA – Customer Data Platform
artefacts.content_summary: Data Protection Impact Assessment for the new customer data analytics platform. Identifies high-risk processing of customer energy usage patterns and recommends pseudonymisation.

notes: Synthetic evidence. DPIA mitigations not yet implemented — represents a gap for evaluation purposes.
